content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Implementation is clean and correct. The `-fast` suffix parsing in `codex_model_reasoning_effort_and_fast` correctly strips the suffix before reasoning effort parsing, with a proper empty-string guard. Both `codex_new_session_args` and `codex_resume_args` add `-c service_tier="fast"` following the same pattern as reasoning effort overrides. Four unit test cases cover the parsing (effort+fast, complex-model+effort+fast, fast-only, effort-only), and two integration tests verify end-to-end argument construction for new session and resume paths. All 56 process_backend tests pass, clippy reports no warnings.

## Amendments

None.
